---
title: MVP Plan
---

## Phase 1 — Core Calendar (weeks 1–2)

- Event creation and editing
- Day, week, and month views
- Local storage persistence

## Phase 2 — Sync (weeks 3–4)

- CalDAV integration
- Conflict resolution
- Offline support

## Phase 3 — Polish (weeks 5–6)

- Keyboard shortcuts
- Notification system
- Export to PDF
